movies.original_title: ตี๋ใหญ่ ฤกษ์ดาวโจร
movies.overview: In 1980s Bangkok, a wily thief stages a series of daring heists, baffling the authorities and the public — until one cop sets out to take him down.
movies.tagline: Meet the "King of Thieves", whose life is coming to an end.
movies.title: Tee Yai: Born to Be Bad

movies.overview: A burnt-out novelist spirals into obsession a character she created in her head, blurring the lines between desire and reality. As she delves deeper she discovers that her fascination may be a mirror reflecting her deepest fears.
movies.tagline: Caterpillars don't know what's going to happen to them, but butterflies know what they once were.
movies.title: Concetta

movies.overview: Follows a ruthless hitman who, after narrowly escaping a fatal attempt on his life, betrays his gang in an effort to find forgiveness but ends up becoming a target himself.
movies.tagline: Once a killer, now the mark.
movies.title: Bang

movies.overview: When the head of a statue sacred to a village is stolen, a young martial artist goes to the big city and finds himself taking on the underworld to retrieve it.
movies.tagline: No computer graphics. No stunt doubles. No wires.
movies.title: Ong-Bak

movies.original_title: หมู่บ้านโคกะโหลก
movies.overview: A wave of chilling serial murders emerges, marked by the gruesome decay of male victims' secret part. As the police investigate, they confront eerie local myths and dark secrets.
movies.tagline: The legend awakens. terrifying. ridiculous. unstoppable.
movies.title: Ko Ga Loak Village

movies.original_title: อนงค์ 2..สามสี่ชาติ
movies.overview: Witness the deep bond between Joe and Anong, which has been long-lasting through many lifetimes and reincarnations.
movies.title: My Boo 2

movies.original_title: ฟู้ดทรัค ลัก (รัก) หมูเด้ง
movies.overview: Jake and Bobby, with the art director by the truck, don't know their vehicle will force Mamiew to face his past once more.
movies.tagline: Love is on the menu but every recipe has its secrets.
movies.title: Food Truck: Stolen Love... and Moo Deng

movies.overview: A young fighter named Kham must go to Australia to retrieve his stolen elephant. With the help of a Thai-born Australian detective, Kham must take on all comers, including a gang led by an evil woman and her two deadly bodyguards.
movies.title: The Protector

movies.original_title: ปากกัด ตีนถีบ
movies.overview: In a fight for survival against a horrifying army of zombies, a former Muay Thai fighter must use skill, speed and grit to save his girlfriend.
movies.tagline: This barehanded fighter will knock down a horde of zombies.
movies.title: Ziam

movies.original_title: ซักซี้ด ห่วยขั้นเทพ
movies.overview: When his boyhood crush Ern returns, Ped forms a band with his friend to impress her. Romantic rivalries bloom after the talented Ern joins the group.
movies.tagline: Sometimes you got to SUCK before you SUCCEED!
movies.title: Suck Seed

movies.overview: A shaman's family learn that their goddess is supposedly controlling one of them. However, their lives take a frightening turn when they realise the goddess has nothing to do with the possession.
movies.tagline: A story about shamanism in Thailand.
movies.title: The Medium

movies.original_title: เขาชุมทอง คะนองชุมโจร
movies.overview: At the tail end of World War II, a bandit leader and his crew go up against his sworn enemy and the Japanese army to rob a train full of gold.
movies.title: Gold Rush Gang

movies.overview: M, a university dropout low on money and luck, volunteers to take care of his terminally ill grandmother, in the hope of pocketing an inheritance.
movies.tagline: Never underestimate a grandma's love for her family.
movies.title: How to Make Millions Before Grandma Dies

movies.overview: When a remote village is plagued by a deadly curse, one brother must fight to save his family from a terrifying supernatural threat.
movies.tagline: The haunted, calling voices will follow you everywhere.
movies.title: Death Whisperer

movies.original_title: ผีใช้ได้ค่ะ
movies.overview: Worried about her husband being allergic to dust, Nat, a recently-dead woman, returns as a ghost possessing a vacuum cleaner to clean the house and protect her family from other vengeful ghosts in the house. To become a useful ghost, she needs to get rid of the useless ones.
movies.title: A Useful Ghost

movies.original_title: ผีช่องแอร์
movies.overview: A group of teen musicians check into a hotel after a night of performance outside of Bangkok, not knowing that the room they are staying in harbors a deadly secret. They must set out to solve the mystery behind a prostitute's murder in that very room to save their lives.
movies.tagline: Death awaits don't look up if you don't dare.
movies.title: The Sisters

movies.overview: Imagine the excitement when four rival divas are brought together to perform on the same stage. But remember, when two ride on a horse, one must sit behind. So, how will these four divas share the spotlight without chaos?
movies.tagline: Battle for the limelight, grab the mic, and burn the stage!
movies.title: Beauty and the Beat

movies.overview: Jan is a boy growing up in 1930s Siam in a wealthy, dysfunctional family where sex has a huge impact on everyone's lives. Jan is viewed by his father as cursed, since his mother died giving birth to him.
movies.title: Jan Dara

movies.overview: Tien, the son of Lord Sihadecho — a murdered nobleman — is taken under the wing of Chernang, a renowned warrior and leader of the Pha Beek Krut.
movies.title: Ong Bak 2

movies.overview: A successful sales executive and his pregnant wife find their dream home. But after moving in, strange occurrences begin to happen, while a mysterious connection between the husband and the house next door emerges.
movies.tagline: Are you ready to stay with the ghost next door?
movies.title: Our House

tv_shows.original_name: เด็กใหม่ The Reset
tv_shows.overview: In a new universe, the mysterious Nanno poses as a transfer student, exposing cruelty by turning power, guilt and desire against those who abuse them.
tv_shows.tagline: When evil strikes every day, Nanno must return

tv_shows.name: Sound Check
tv_shows.original_name: ซาวด์เช็ก
tv_shows.overview: Zani and Tum host a series of talks with their celebrity guests interspersed with live musical performances.

tv_shows.name: I Can See Your Voice Thailand
tv_shows.original_name: นักร้องซ่อนแอบ
tv_shows.overview: Thailand version of the reality singing competition where g celebrities must correctly guess a real singer, based on appearance and a few hints only.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Presented with a group of seven "mystery singers" identified only by their occupation, a guest artist must attempt to eliminate bad singers from the group without ever hearing them sing, assisted by clues and a celebrity panel over the course of four rounds. At the end of the game, the last remaining mystery singer is revealed as either good or bad by means of a duet between them and one of the guest artists.

seasons.name: Season 4
seasons.overview:
The fourth season of the mystery music game show I Can See Your Voice Thailand will air November 4, 2020, on Workpoint TV. I Can See Your Voice Thailand is the Thai adaption of the South Korean program of the same name. The show is hosted by Kan Kantathavorn and Somkiat Chanphram.

However, due to the COVID-19 pandemic in Thailand, episodes will continue filming but with no audience admitted with enhanced COVID-19 safety protocols being in effect.

seasons.name: Festival
seasons.overview: For this season, under the original format, the guest artist can eliminate one or two mystery singers after each round. The game concludes with the last mystery singer standing that depends on outcome of a duet performance with a guest artist.

seasons.name: TPOP
seasons.overview: T-pop artists are presented with six singers whose singing abilities are a mystery. Through a series of four rounds, the guest artist is given new information that may or may not help them eliminate potential bad singers. In the end, the artist will learn if their final pick is in fact a good singer when they perform a duet with them.

seasons.name: Specials
seasons.overview: A "special" love story that continues the sweetness of "Fourever You", following Johan and North as they take the next step in a relationship that has grown beyond just being like brothers.

seasons.name: Part One
seasons.overview: Easter joins a northern Thai university to escape his past but reunites with his ex, Hill. Meanwhile, his roommate North faces chaos with his flirty creditor.

seasons.name: Part Two
seasons.overview: Three friends navigate painful secrets, spiritual mysteries, and lonely hearts as they find love with medical students against all odds

tv_shows.name: Suea Chani Keng
tv_shows.original_name: เสือ ชะนี เก้ง
tv_shows.overview: Three BFFs live in the same condominium building and face life and love together. Tum, a playboy photographer who doesn’t believe in true love because his girlfriend left him with a luxury condominium to pay off alone. Oil, Tum’s friend, offers to help him find a roommate to share the rent. Turns out the new roommate is Cheetah aka Chatree, Tum’s gay friend who used to be secretly in love with him. Tum cut off his friendship with Cheetah a long time ago because Cheetah tricked him to believe that he was straight.

seasons.name: Specials
seasons.overview: This series is about three friends retelling their first year in college together. Chatri tries to stay in the closet due to his military general father; Oil is a rich and arrogant woman who thinks she is the best, and Tum is a charming Casanova who wants to go to the big city and meet girls. When Oil falls for Chatri, Chatri falls for Tum, and Tum falls for beautiful girls in college, drama and comedy unfolds.

last_episode_to_air.name: Have Fun, No Drama

tv_shows.name: Iron Chef Thailand
tv_shows.original_name: เชฟกระทะเหล็ก ประเทศไทย
tv_shows.overview: เชฟกระทะเหล็ก ประเทศไทย เป็นเกมโชว์การทำอาหาร ออกอากาศทุกวันพุธ เวลา 23.00 น. - 01.00 น. โดยเริ่มอากาศครั้งแรกเมื่อวันพุธที่ 25 มกราคม พ.ศ. 2555 ทางสถานีโทรทัศน์สีกองทัพบกช่อง 7 ตามรูปแบบของรายการ ยุทธการกระทะเหล็ก ที่ออกอากาศครั้งแรกวันที่ 10 ตุลาคม พ.ศ. 2536 โดยได้รับลิขสิทธิ์จากบริษัท ฟูจิ ครีเอทีฟ คอร์ปอเรชั่น จำกัด ประเทศญี่ปุ่น โดยได้รับลิขสิทธิ์ในการผลิตรายการนี้ ในอีกหลายภาษา

tv_shows.name: ClaireBell
tv_shows.original_name: คลั่ง/รัก/นักโทษ
tv_shows.overview: Fate led Bell, an unfortunate young woman, into prison, where she had to struggle for survival alone, without hope. That was until Claire, a mysterious female inmate, appeared to help her. And from that moment on... the encounter between these two souls began to fill this dark and desolate place with a small glimmer of light, one that gradually grew into love.

tv_shows.name: Heart Code
tv_shows.original_name: สืบลับจับใจ

Among them is Captain Thara, a well-known officer who grows close to Vicky, unaware that Vicky is the daughter of the senior officer linked to her father’s death 19 years ago.

tv_shows.original_name: DMD Friendship The Reality
tv_shows.overview: A group of artist trainees compete in a reality show to develop skills and find the perfect partner to win a lead role in a new Domundi BL series.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: A group of eight Domundi artist trainees come together in this reality show where they'll develop their skills and compete in a series of missions. All the while, they'll be working on their chemistry in the search for a partner they'll be compatible with both on and off screen. The prize is a the opportunity to perform as the lead couple in a new Domundi Y series.
